settings.text: A free consultation call is the first step. No commitment. Just a conversation about what you want to achieve and how to get there.

settings.title: Book Your Consult
settings.description: Pick a time that works for you using the contact details below. The first session is always free — no credit card, no obligation.

settings.title: We Talk Goals
settings.description: A 30-minute call to understand where you are, where you want to be, and what's held you back. Honest and direct from the start.

settings.title: Get Your Plan
settings.description: Within 48 hours you'll receive a fully personalised training and nutrition programme — built for you, ready to start immediately.

settings.question: Is the first session really free?
settings.answer: Yes. The consultation has no cost and no obligation. It's a conversation — if it's not the right fit for either of us, no pressure at all.

settings.question: What happens after the consultation?
settings.answer: You'll receive a programme proposal within 48 hours outlining the recommended format, schedule, and exactly what's included. No surprise fees, no upsells.

settings.question: Where are in-person sessions held?
settings.answer: In-person sessions take place at the private studio. Online coaching is available to clients anywhere — train wherever you are.

settings.question: How long are programmes?
settings.answer: Most clients start with a 12-week commitment — long enough to see real, measurable change. Shorter trial options are available on request during the consultation.

settings.text: Get in touch to schedule your free consultation.
